parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ incidentType: 'environmental_hazard', severity: $json.severity, probability: $json.probability, message: 'EU AQI: ' + $json.aqi + ' (' + $json.primaryConcern + '). PM2.5: ' + $json.pm25 + ' μg/m³. SO2: ' + $json.so2 + ' μg/m³.', source: 'n8n_environmental_monitor', metadata: { aqi: $json.aqi, pm25: $json.pm25, pm10: $json.pm10, no2: $json.no2, so2: $json.so2 } }) }}
